goal: Execute the full round-3 playtest response: bug slice, combat feel, UI overhaul, library interior, and the outside-review prompt
completed: PR #17 (merged, deployed): C3 door/art alignment (measured per-building door_dx drives collision gap, registry triggers/entries, lamps, walkways; valley rebaked, diff confined), C4 animal Y-sort feet anchoring, C5 enemy corner steering (0.35s tangent commit knob), round-3 findings/triage doc

PR #18 (merged, deployed): D combat feel (G/H + numpad keys with legacy aliases, hold-to-charge bow 1-3 dmg / 120-200 px/s over 0.9s draw, white sword swipe), E UI (Pixelify Sans OFL font + dark StyleBoxFlat panels everywhere, mouse in creator, full 16-action remap screen persisted to user://controls.json, Evan as a modular boy NPC with dialogue), F library interior (17x12 baker study behind the inn arch, 10 levels / 18 transitions), G review prompt doc
Post-merge main verified green: CI, playtest bot, deploy - the round-3 build is live on norfolk-path.vercel.app
PR #19 (OPEN, blocked): docs-only fix removing a fabricated 'built for my kids' framing from the review prompt
discovered: Door art is off-center on 4/6 building sprites (house_a -17px, house_g -43px, house_j -26px, house_e +12px); measured by ruler-marked contact sheet after a luminance heuristic failed
Animals' Y-sort origins sat up to 11px above the +9px feet-below-origin convention the player (feet at row 41 of 64px frame) and props share - the chicken-on-face root cause
Cute_Fantasy_UI pack ships only the same unreadable 5x9 font; raw.githubusercontent.com IS reachable through the proxy, so google/fonts OFL fetches work
GitHub Actions jobs failing at 0ms duration (runner never starts) = account minutes/spending limit or GH incident, not a code failure
decisions: Keys: G sword / H bow for P1, numpad 1/2/3 for P2; old keys stay as aliases until remapped (a remap replaces ALL bindings for that action)
UI font is Pixelify Sans (OFL, license committed); old 5x9 font deleted, which retires the subpixel-reimport chore
Controls screen lives in the pause menu only; title-screen entry deferred (player_select is a rigid 2-option stage machine)
Evan is built from the modular player layers (EvanNpc.PROFILE data), not a premade adult sheet
Norfolk Path is a personal engine-learning project - NOT built for kids/family (round-3 correction from Chris)
lessons: Never invent user context in deliverables: the review prompt shipped with a fabricated 'built for my kids' framing that Chris had to correct - project framing belongs to the user, verify before writing it into docs
Diff-bbox confinement checks (PIL) on rebaked ground PNGs catch generator drift cheaply - keep doing this for every map edit
gdformat undoes generated-file formatting: always run gdformat after regenerating prop_table.gd or the diff explodes with reflow noise
MCP actions_list responses are ~400KB - parse the saved tool-result file with python instead of re-querying
files_changed: scenes/*.tscn (8 UI scenes: font + dark panels)
open_questions: Do numpad 1/2/3 bindings behave with NumLock off on the web export?

Is Pixelify Sans legible at the chosen sizes on the real build (bot screenshots pending human eyes)?
What does the real Evan look like - EvanNpc.PROFILE awaits his hair/shirt
